title: RealMLP expert with alternate CV split seed
summary: Add a RealMLP expert trained using a different StratifiedKFold random seed.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Add one extra RealMLP prediction stream trained with the same features and parameters but a different CV split random_state. Ensure all OOF predictions remain true OOF for their own split before blending lightly.
expected_effect: Increase test prediction diversity through a different fold partition.
risk: OOF comparisons across different folds can become harder to interpret if implemented carelessly.
